name: Lemon Chicken Ala Betty
recipeInstructions:
1. Season both sides of the chicken breasts with 1/2 cup flour and paprika.
2. Heat shortening in a frying pan over medium heat. Brown the chicken breasts until cooked through. Transfer to a greased casserole dish sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
3. Sprinkle lemon peel over each breast, then sprinkle brown sugar evenly over top (about 1/2 teaspoon per piece).
4. Slice the second lemon and place slices on top of the chicken.
5. Pour the juice from one grated lemon over the chicken. Add 1 cup chicken broth, stirring in any pan drippings into the casserole dish.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 50 minutes, or until cooked through. Serve over wild rice or plain rice.
Note: This recipe is Aunt Betty's (Mondress). It can also be adapted with bone-in chicken pieces by baking longer. The brown sugar is the secret ingredient that gives it a special taste.
